info.title: ThemezerNX
info.author: suchmememanyskill
info.details:
This app downloads themes from https://themezer.net/ and installs them through the nxthemesinstaller.

You probably want to have the nxthemesinstaller either installed via the hbappstore or as nro in the switch folder in order for this app to be able to install themes.
You can also download themes, and they'll be stored inside sd:/Themes/ThemezerNX/(target)/(creator)/(themename).nxtheme

changelog:
v3.2.1
The previous release was having some issues on consoles with outdated certificate stores. Some security measures were reverted in this release to fix error 60.

v3.2.0
Another set of improvements
 Added:
- New initial launch screen, which clearly shows what ways of installing there are.
- Rising (new default) and trending sort options.

 Modified:
- New storage path and name structure. Each pack is now stored in its own pack folder.
- Better error handling, which should prevent corrupted nxthemes from being created.
- Pressing a button now toggles a menu.
- Even faster image loading!

v3.0.0
I felt it was time for another session of improving the HB app, so hereby:
 Added:
- Quick ID lookup functionality, allowing users to search for themes or packs by entering a Quick ID from an item page on 
- Pack install all & download all buttons, with picker in case of duplicates for the same menu (https://github.com/suchmememanyskill/themezer-nx/issues/7)

 Modified:
- Reworked app appearance (colors, icons, splash screen)
- Faster image loading + loading placeholder rendering
- Responsiveness improvements
- Updated Themezer API again

v2.0.3
As the title says. Compatible with HOS 21.0.0 and Atmosphere 1.10

2.0.2
Properly url encode request parameters so requests to the themezer-api don't get blocked
Update the themezer api (see #12)
Download to /Themes/ThemezerNX/(Target) - (Author) - (Themename).nxtheme instead of /Themes/ThemezerNX/(Target)/(Author)/(Themename).nxtheme

2.0.0
A lot of the ui has been re-organised or re-colored by @Migushthe2nd!

Added:
Button shortcuts are now displayed in the UI
Icons have been added to the side menus
The path /switch/NXThemesInstaller/NXThemesInstaller.nro is now an option for the installer nro placement (thanks @FlyingBananaTree)
Errors in queries are now displayed to the user, rather than silently ignored
Modified:
The color scheme and iconography now more closely resembles the site's UI
Button shortcuts have been expanded, besides L and R now X, Y and minus have an assignment (see above)
The queued installs menu now only shows installs that are queued

1.1.2

Themezer-nx now auto starts at the Packs tab, rather than the All tab
The LR buttons can now be used to navigate between pages
